# terrible_community_general_interfaces_file (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `address_family` (String) Address family of the interface, useful if same interface name is used for both `inet` and `inet6`.
- `backup` (Boolean) Create a backup file including the timestamp information so you can get the original file back if you somehow clobbered it incorrectly.
- `dest` (String) Path to the interfaces file.
- `iface` (String) Name of the interface, required for value changes or option remove.
- `option` (String) Name of the option, required for value changes or option remove.
- `state` (String) If set to `absent` the option or section is removed if present instead of created.
- `value` (String) If `option` is not presented for the `iface` and `state` is `present`, then `option` is added. If `option` already exists and is not `pre-up`, `up`, `post-up` or `down`, its value is updated. `pre-up`, `up`, `post-up` and `down` options cannot be updated, only adding new options, removing existing ones or cleaning the whole option set are supported.

### Read-Only

- `ifaces` (String) Interfaces dictionary.
